result.stdout:
Description:
  A CLI tool to pack mod source from MSL.

Usage:
  ModShardPacker [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <name>                 Name of the output. []
  -f, --folder <folder> (REQUIRED)  Folder of the mod code source.
  -o, --output <output>             Output folder. []
  -d, --dll <dll>                   Folder where all dlls needed to compile are located. []
  -v, --is-verbose                  Enable log output into a log file in the cwd. [default: False]
  --version                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information
